engine_identity.note: NOT identical pg engine — separate instances, different builds and shared_preload_libraries
engine_identity.shared_instance_impossible_reason: Cluster-wide role-namespace collision: authenticator/anon/authenticated/service_role are reserved by supautils; ALTER ROLE authenticator PASSWORD would break PostgREST live pool.

supabase_gotrue.note: CPU-only KDF; no large memory requirement; default GoTrue cost
